wiki.summary: In “Sloppy Joe,” the third track from slayr’s 2025 mixtape Half Blood, he sings and raps about a current love interest of his, with the song’s title referring to her performing oral sex for him. While he maintains that the relationship isn’t perfect, he assures her that he will be a good boyfriend to her. “Sloppy Joe” by slayr was produced by slayr & waera. slayr released “Sloppy Joe” on November 5, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
